items.title: Adding float support (kinda...)
items.content_html:
Adding float support (kinda...)

In the latest release Formal now allows to store floats in any storage.

items.title: Mass update
items.content_html:
Mass update

In the latest release Formal now offers a way to update multiple aggregates directly at the adapter level thanks to a new feature called Effects

items.title: Aggregate state and union types
items.content_html:
Aggregate state and union types

Let's launch this new documentation by showing how the new Just specification opens an interesting Aggregate design.
